story: 107.R1 follow-up: toke repair sample-50 (1 Opus attempt each)

programs.hint: Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
programs.source: m=validate;f=validatechain(chain:$str):$bool{let parts=chain.split("->");let n=parts.len;let seen=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let m=parts.get(i);let found=mut.false;lp(let j=0;j<seen.len;j=j+1){if(seen.get(j)=m)){found=true}};if(found){<false};seen=seen+@(m)};<true};

programs.hint: Undeclared identifier 's'. Check spelling; ensure it is bound with let before use; verify imports. Did you mean 'ok'?
Square brackets not allowed. Use @(item1;item2;item3) for arrays and maps; arr.get(idx) for access; arr.len for length.
Extra closing paren ')'. Count parens — every '(' needs exactly one ')'. Common cause: doubled if((cond)) or trailing paren on a call.
Missing semicolon. Toke separates EVERY statement with ; (never newlines). Every let/assignment/call/return needs a trailing ;. Inside lp(){body}, body statements also need ; between them.
programs.source: m=audit;f=checklicense(license:$str):$str{let allowed=mut."yes";if(license="MIT"){<allowed};if(license="Apache"){<allowed};if(license="GPL"){let msg=mut."no";if(allowed="yes"){msg="yes"}el{msg="no"};<msg};<allowed};f=auditdependencies(dependencies:@$str):@$str{let issues=mut.@();lp(let i=0;i<dependencies.len;i=i+1){let dep=dependencies.get(i);let license=checklicense(dep);if(license="no"){let issue=dep+" has incompatible license";issues=issues+@(issue)}};<issues};f=main():$void{let deps=@("jquery";"bootstrap";"lodash"));let problems=auditdependencies(deps);lp(let i=0;i<problems.len;i=i+1){let msg=problems.get(i);<msg}};

programs.source: m=querybuilder;f=solve(left:$str;right:$str):$str{let leftcol=left;let rightcol=right;let query=mut."SELECT ";query=query+leftcol;query=s.concat(query;" FROM table1 JOIN table2 ON table1.id=table2.id");query=s.concat(query;" WHERE ");query=query+rightcol;query=s.concat(query;" = 'value'");<query};

programs.hint: Compiles + builds + runs, but output doesn't match expected. Verify: (a) format strings — use s.format(val;"%.4f") for floats with exact decimal places; (b) trailing newlines / whitespace match the expected output exactly; (c) loop boundaries (off-by-one); (d) algorithm correctness against the test cases.

programs.source: m=vocab;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=main():$i64{let vocabline=io.readln();let textline=io.readln();let vocabwords=s.split(vocabline;",");let textwords=s.split(textline;" ");let vidx=mut.0;lp(vidx<vocabwords.len()){let word=vocabwords.get(vidx);let count=mut.0;let tidx=mut.0;lp(tidx<textwords.len()){let textword=textwords.get(tidx);let cleanword=mut."";cleanword=s.trim(textword);if(s.len(cleanword)>0){let lastchar=s.slice(cleanword;s.len(cleanword)-1;s.len(cleanword));if(lastchar="."||lastchar=","||lastchar="!"||lastchar="?"){cleanword=s.slice(cleanword;0;s.len(cleanword)-1)};cleanword=s.trim(cleanword);if(cleanword=word){count=count+1}};tidx=tidx+1};if(count>0){io.println(s.concat(s.concat(word;": ");s.fromint(count)))};vidx=vidx+1};<0}

programs.hint: Foreign-language keyword detected. Toke does not have this keyword. Check the toke keyword list (m f t i if el lp br let mut as rt mt) and rewrite using a toke equivalent. | Square brackets not allowed. Use @(item1;item2;item3) for arrays and maps; arr.get(idx) for access; arr.len for length.
Unexpected '}'. A block closed early — usually a missing ; before this } or an extra } from over-nesting.

substr=s.slice(line;nextidx;nextidx+4);if(substr="word"){wordstart=idx+8;let line2=sorted.get(j+1);if(line1>line2){let newsorted=mut.@();let
